note: Merchant connector registry. Affiliate IDs live here (config), never in product records or page markup. graph.js builds outbound links from a product's {merchant, merchantRef} plus this config: when affiliateId is set, the affiliate linkTemplate is used with rel=sponsored; while it is null, the plain directTemplate is used instead. Flipping a merchant to monetised is a one-line config change — no product or page edits.

amazon.name: Amazon
amazon.notes: ref = ASIN. affiliateId pending Associates approval (needs 3 qualifying sales). Use OneLink for geo-routing later.

etsy.name: Etsy
etsy.notes: ref = Etsy listing ID. Awin application pending; direct listing links until then.

ebay.name: eBay
ebay.notes: ref = eBay item ID. Good fit for rare/retired collectibles.

shopify-partner.name: Boutique partners
shopify-partner.notes: ref = full partner product path (domain + path). Direct rev-share partnerships with indie cute-goods stores.
